steps.t: Dwalin's throne is in Thorin's Hall, far to the west of Moria. Valthor has instructed you to go forth and boast of your great deeds before the throne …
Thrymur is near Dwalin's throne in Thorin's Hall. Speak with him now that you have proclaimed your deeds to all assembled in Thorin's Hall.
Valthor is at the Shadowed Refuge in the Foundations of Stone in Moria, far to the east of Thorin's Hall. Now that you have boasted to the dwarves, re…
